summary: Track BYOL license compliance with License Manager: create and retire license configurations, adjust license counts, toggle hard-limit enforcement, retag configurations, and associate or disassociate EC2 resources.

operations.title: Create a new license configuration
operations.summary: Set up a new license pool to track how software licenses are used. An engineer reviews and applies it.
operations.description: Provisions a new AWS License Manager license configuration to track BYOL entitlements (counting type, count, hard-limit enforcement) for a new application or licensing pool.

params.name: config_name
params.label: Configuration name
params.help: Short identifying name, e.g. app-core-license-config.

params.name: description
params.label: Description
params.help: Free-text note on what this configuration licenses.

params.name: license_counting_type
params.label: Counting type
params.help: Unit AWS uses to count consumed licenses. Cannot be changed after creation.

params.name: license_count
params.label: License count
params.help: Total number of licenses available in this pool.

params.name: license_count_hard_limit
params.label: Enforce hard limit
params.help: If true, new launches are blocked once the count is exhausted.

params.name: tags
params.label: Tags
params.help: Key/value tags applied at creation.

operations.title: Associate a resource with a license configuration
operations.summary: Link a server or image to a license pool so its usage counts toward that license.
operations.description: Links an existing EC2 instance or AMI to a license configuration so its consumption counts against that licensing pool for compliance tracking.

params.name: license_config
params.label: License configuration
params.help: The license configuration the resource will be associated with.

params.name: resource_arn
params.label: Resource ARN
params.help: ARN of the EC2 instance, AMI, or host resource to associate.

operations.title: Update license count
operations.summary: Change how many licenses this pool tracks, for example after buying more.
operations.description: Changes the total number of licenses tracked by a license configuration, e.g. after purchasing additional BYOL entitlements or reconciling a compliance audit.

params.name: license_config
params.label: License configuration
params.help: The license configuration to update.

params.name: new_license_count
params.label: New license count
params.help: Total licenses available after the change.

operations.title: Toggle license hard-limit enforcement
operations.summary: Turn hard-limit enforcement on or off. When on, new server launches are blocked once the licenses run out.
operations.description: Enables or disables hard-limit enforcement on a license configuration. Enabling it will block new EC2 launches once the license count is exhausted, so review current consumption first.

params.name: license_config
params.label: License configuration
params.help: The license configuration to update.

params.name: new_hard_limit
params.label: Enforce hard limit
params.help: true blocks further consumption above the license count; false only reports overages.

operations.title: Update license configuration tags
operations.summary: Add or update tags on a license pool. Only the tags you list change; others are left alone. No effect on tracking.
operations.description: Sets or merges cost-allocation or ownership tags on a license configuration. Only the keys you supply change; tags you do not list are left untouched.

params.name: license_config
params.label: License configuration
params.help: The license configuration to retag.

params.name: new_tags
params.label: New tags
params.help: Full key/value tag set to apply, replacing the existing tags.

operations.title: Disassociate a resource from a license configuration
operations.summary: Unlink a server or image from a license pool so its usage no longer counts. The resource itself is unaffected.
operations.description: Removes the link between an EC2 instance or AMI and a license configuration, stopping that resource's consumption from counting against the licensing pool. The resource itself is unaffected.

params.name: association
params.label: Resource association
params.help: The resource-to-license-configuration association to remove.

operations.title: Delete a license configuration
operations.summary: Permanently delete a license pool and its compliance history. Can't be undone; an engineer reviews it first.
operations.description: Permanently removes a license configuration and its compliance history. Any resources still associated with it must be disassociated first, and any related License Manager reporting is lost.

params.name: license_config
params.label: License configuration
params.help: The license configuration to permanently delete.

operations.title: Re-point association to a different license configuration
operations.summary: Move an existing link to a different license pool. Applying replaces the link, briefly interrupting tracking; engineer-only.
operations.description: Changes which license configuration an existing association tracks consumption against by updating the license_configuration_arn argument; the association is immutable in the provider, so it is destroyed and recreated to re-point, briefly interrupting tracking. The target configuration is chosen from existing License Manager license configurations in inventory (never free-text). Re-pointing shifts this resource's consumption into the new pool, which could push that pool over its hard limit, so review the target pool's headroom first.

params.name: association
params.label: Resource association
params.help: The existing resource-to-license-configuration association to re-point.

params.name: new_license_config
params.label: New license configuration
params.help: The license configuration the association will now track consumption against; resolves to its ARN.

operations.title: Re-point association to a different resource
operations.summary: Move an existing link to a different server or image. Applying replaces the link, briefly interrupting tracking; engineer-only.
operations.description: Changes which AWS resource (EC2 instance or AMI) an existing association tracks by updating the resource_arn argument; the association is immutable in the provider, so it is destroyed and recreated to re-point, briefly interrupting tracking. The new ARN is validated against a strict ARN format pattern. Re-pointing moves consumption from the old resource to the new one within the same license configuration.

params.name: association
params.label: Resource association
params.help: The existing resource-to-license-configuration association to re-point.

params.name: new_resource_arn
params.label: New resource ARN
params.help: ARN of the EC2 instance or AMI the association will now track.
